goal:
BUILD: Code Validator (Tier 1: Foundation)

WHY: Validate generated Python code: syntax, imports, test execution

ALREADY BUILT AND PASSING: memory_compressor, metrics, search_cache
Do NOT rebuild any of those.

SPEC - Build exactly this in code_validator.py:
Class CodeValidator with: check_syntax(code_str)->tuple[bool, str], check_imports(code_str)->list[str] returning missing modules, run_tests(file_path)->tuple[bool, str] executing the file and checking output, validate_all(file_path)->dict with syntax_ok, imports_ok, tests_ok, issues list.

TESTS MUST VERIFY:
Test with valid code, code with syntax error, code with missing import, code with failing test

RULES:
1. Read relevant source files first (memory.py, config.py) if you need to understand the system
2. Write COMPLETE working code in code_validator.py
3. Include 'if __name__ == "__main__":' test block
4. Tests MUST print 'ALL TESTS PASSED' when everything works
5. Don't import agent.py in tests (loads MLX model, too slow)
6. CAN import from memory.py, config.py, or other agent_outputs/*.py
7. Fix errors until tests pass, then say DONE
